ability: 每个夜晚*，你要选择一名玩家，他死亡。若你死于处决且没有玩家使用投票标记，一名爪牙变成斯克恩。
otherNightReminder: If a Skorn was executed yesterday with no vote token spent, replace 1 Alive Minion token with a spare Skorn token. Wake the new Skorn. Show them the YOU ARE token, then the Skorn token. The Skorn then chooses a player.
flavor: They say the wicked will be punished, and yet all my execution did was make my job a whole lot easier. As you may imagine, it's not easy for those suckers in the living world to survive an incorporeal killer they can't get rid of..
